name: House of Girls
overview: All they need is one thing: Popularity! Ten female musicians, each with a unique genre and charm, have gathered in one house. To become a 3-member multi-musician unit, they face fierce competition on stage, and live a music-filled life full of unexpected twists in a secretive house! A story of their journey to capture both music and mass appeal.

trailers.title: [2차 티저] “다 발라줄게” 최종 타이틀을 노리는 10인 아티스트들의 치열한 경쟁🔥 5/23 [금] 밤 11시 첫 방송 #하우스오브걸스
[1차 티저] 특별한 뮤지션 탄생을 위한 100일간의 뮤직 이야기🎵 5/23 [금] 밤 11시 첫 방송  #하우스오브걸스
